results.header:
5 Av/53 St [E][F] Station is exit only during weekday AM rush hours

results.description:
All other times, enter/exit station via 5 Av side only. The Madison Av side will remain closed at all times.

What's happening?
We're replacing escalators.

results.header: In the Bronx, Woodlawn-bound [4] skips Burnside Av
results.description:
Use nearby 176 St or 183 St stations.

Additional travel alternatives:
For service to this station, take the [4] to 183 St and transfer to a Manhattan-bound train.

For service from this station, take the [4] to 176 St and transfer to a Woodlawn-bound train.

results.header:
In Queens, Manhattan-bound [7] skips 69 St and 52 St
All trains at 61 St-Woodside board from the Flushing-bound platform
results.description:
Use nearby 74 St-Broadway, 61 St-Woodside or 46 St-Bliss St stations.

Additional travel alternatives:
For service to 69 St, take the [7] to 61 St-Woodside and transfer to a Flushing-bound [7].

For service to 52 St, take the [7] to 46 St-Bliss St and transfer to a Flushing-bound [7].

For service from these stations, take the [7] to 61 St-Woodside or 74 St-Broadway and transfer to a Manhattan-bound [7].

Note: There will be temporary platforms located at 46 St-Bliss St, 40 St-Lowery St and 33 St-Rawson St.

What's happening?
Structural maintenance
